title: MonsterFlow spec.md frontmatter (v1, slice-2)
description: Slice 2 of dynamic-roster-per-gate. Adds tier_policy and tags_provenance blocks alongside the slice-1 tags: field. All three top-level fields (tags, tier_policy, tags_provenance) are OPTIONAL — pre-feature specs are grandfathered. additionalProperties: true is intentional (constitution-style metadata: name, description, status, gate_mode, etc. pass through untouched). The tag-enum is shared with persona-frontmatter.schema.json via the external tag-enum.schema.json file.

tags.description: Closed-enum content tags for the spec. Drives resolver fit_score = |spec.tags ∩ persona.fit_tags|. Optional in v1 (grandfathered specs); /spec Phase 3 offers inference on next revision for specs without this field.

tier_policy.description: Optional per-spec override of constitution-level tier_policy. Spec.md may RAISE quality (bump opus_min, add Opus pins) but cannot RETARGET security personas downward — SEC-01 floor enforcement lives in _tier_assign.py. Key-level merge with constitution (spec wins on conflict for whitelisted keys).

panel.description: Nested panel sub-block (alternative to flat shape; matches constitution example in pipeline-config.md).

tier_pins.description: Gate-scoped persona→tier pins. Outer key is the gate (spec-review|plan|check); inner key is the persona slug; inner value is the tier. Security-class personas (fit_tags includes 'security') cannot be pinned below security_floor — enforced at _tier_assign.py validate_tier_pins().

spec_overridable_keys.description: Constitution-only key in practice (spec.md should not set this — but schema does not forbid it for forward compatibility).

tags_provenance.description: Optional informational record of how tags: was populated. Author-writable but resolver-recomputed — _tag_baseline.py re-runs at every dispatch and asserts recorded_baseline ⊆ recomputed_baseline (SEC-04 / Edge Case 23). Used by /spec Phase 3 to render the provenance comment.

baseline.description: Tags detected by _tag_baseline.py regex pass (deterministic floor).

llm_added.description: Tags added by LLM inference on top of baseline.

user_overrides.description: Tags added or kept by explicit user action in /spec Phase 3 confirmation.
